course_weight_override._note: Slightly elevated vs default (0.22/0.17): Blue Monster winner archetype is highly specific (bombers + iron accuracy). Limited course history (post-2020 return) caps leverage.

course_history_note: Cadillac Championship 2026 (event_id 556) is a brand-new return to Doral — DataGolf has no archive at this id. Pull WGC-Cadillac Championship history from event_id 473, years 2011-2016 (the prior PGA Tour era at Trump National Doral Blue Monster).
course_notes: Par-72, 7425y. Water in play on 14 holes. Narrow fairways with thick rough. Elevated greens require precise iron play. ESE trade winds 12-18 mph typical in late April — significant factor on approach shots. Bermuda greens, stimp ~13.0. Winner profile: long off tee AND elite iron accuracy. Course returned to PGA Tour 2020 (previously WGC Cadillac from 2007-2016). Historical specialists: Scheffler (2023), McIlroy (2022), Morikawa (2021), Johnson (2020).
winner_archetype: Long-game dominator with elite iron play and course management. Must carry water on multiple holes. Wind management and fairway accuracy are differentiators. Above-average driving distance AND fairway hit % are both required — rare combination that limits the pool of true contenders.

wind_profile.impact_notes: Wind significantly affects approach shots and short game. Par-4s demand control off tee.

bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — Individual BBI v8.5 rankings active. Phase 1 / THEMIS / OMNIA all run normally. Pool + DFS outputs published.
